page_content:
Restriction: Permission of instructor.

ENAE499 Elective Research (3 Credits)

Undergraduate research project and paper conducted under the direction of an aerospace engineering faculty member to be presented at a conference or competition.

Prerequisite: Permission from student's advisor required.

Restriction: Senior standing or higher; and must be in Engineering: Aerospace program; and permission of instructor; and permission of ENGR-Aerospace Engineering department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
